englishDefinitions: To become mentally or emotionally stuck on the Vietnam War or on events and images connected with it.
To keep focusing on Vietnam in a way that prevents moving on to other topics or concerns.
persianTranslation: در ویتنام/ماجرای ویتنام ذهنی درجا زدن
examples: Some critics said the country had gotten hung up in Vietnam for too long.
He seemed gotten hung up in Vietnam and could not stop talking about the war.
The film shows a generation that got hung up in Vietnam and struggled to move forward.
